steps.title: Compare one lake across years
steps.content: The claim is about a decline in ice duration between the early 1980s and mid-2000s, so the best data compare the same lake in 1980-81 and 2005-06.

steps.title: Eliminate choices comparing wrong items
steps.content: Choice B and Choice C compare Kalmarinjarvi with Mirror Lake, so they do not directly show decline for one lake over time. Choice D shows a gain in Lake Neusiedl between the two periods, not a decline. Choice A directly states fewer ice days for Kalmarinjarvi in 2005-06 than in 1980-81. The answer is A.
